week1_summary: • TC “INDAY” remains present over the northeastern portion of the PAR. • Forecast indicates that TC ”INDAY” will move towards the Taiwan – Eastern China area; • Moreover, a TC-like vortex (TCLV) (1) is forecast to emerge over the eastern boundary of the PMD with a low likelihood of TC development during week-1.
week2_summary: • Forecasts suggest that TCLV (1) will enter the PAR with a low probability of TC development; • In addition, a TCLV (2) will likely develop over the western boundary of the PAR with a low likelihood of TC formation over week-2.
conclusion: Therefore, the TC-THREAT POTENTIAL IS ACTIVE over week-1 and LESS LIKELY in week-2.
